faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Jackson Heights?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Jackson Heights typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Jackson Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications approved for use in residential buildings. Heat treatment is highly effective for severe infestations and kills bed bugs in all life stages, while chemical treatments work well for preventive measures and follow-up applications in multi-unit buildings.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Jackson Heights?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments are completed in one day, though heat treatment typically takes 6-8 hours while chemical applications may require 2-4 hours plus follow-up visits. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection and work with your schedule to minimize disruption.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Jackson Heights apartment before bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is essential for effective treatment. We'll provide a detailed checklist that includes washing bedding, decluttering, and moving furniture away from walls. For heat treatment, certain items like medications and electronics may need to be temporarily removed. Our team guides you through every step of the preparation process.
